name: caddy-cloudflare
why: xcaddy build with Cloudflare DNS plugin for ACME DNS-01 wildcard certs
remove_when: never — Cloudflare DNS plugin is not in upstream Caddy

name: cadvisor
why: v0.56.2 fixes Docker 29+ crash but isn't published as a container image

name: mcp-git
why: Custom Dockerfile with git+ssh deps and Docker secret injection entrypoint
remove_when: upstream publishes an official Docker image with HTTP transport

name: mcp-auth-proxy
why: Patched build — VARCHAR(255) fix for session storage (sigbit/mcp-auth-proxy#111)
remove_when: upstream merges the VARCHAR fix and publishes a new release

name: semaphore
why: Semaphore UI + homelab tools (sops, age, dig, curl, jq, rsync) for Ansible playbooks
remove_when: never — homelab tooling layer is always needed on top of upstream

name: restic-scheduler
why: restic + rclone + supercronic in one container — replaces resticker's three-container pattern
remove_when: never — supercronic scheduler layer is always needed on top of restic
